caption: A man and a woman are seated in wooden armchairs on a stage with a dark purple background featuring bright purple accent lights. The man, on the left, has dark curly hair and wears a white long-sleeved button-down shirt. He sits with his hands clasped in his lap, looking toward the woman. The woman, on the right, has blonde hair tied back and wears a black t-shirt with the white text "WHO'S IN YOUR" printed on it, with a graphic below. She is speaking and gesturing slightly with her hands held in front of her. Between them on the floor is a piece of white technical equipment. Across the sequence, the man remains relatively still, watching the woman, while she continues to speak, her facial expression shifting slightly and her hands moving subtly as she talks.
